title: Cyber-Neon Conflict
concept: A high-octane digital duel occurring within the shimmering circuits and neon-lit skyscrapers of a futuristic metropolis, where data streams manifest as physical weapons.

images: Cinematic wide shot of a cyberpunk city at night with blue and pink neon lights, rain-slicked streets, and towering skyscrapers with digital billboards.
High-tech cyber warrior with glowing armor interfaces standing on a rooftop, holographic screens floating in the air, intense gaze, cinematic lighting.
Two hackers engaged in a digital duel, streams of binary code and light particles clashing in a virtual reality space, neon explosions.
Close-up of a futuristic computer core emitting electric gold sparks and data fragments, high-speed camera movement, macro detail.
A desolate neon alleyway after a battle, flickering signs, smoke rising from a discarded neural link device, monochrome highlights with blue accents.
asset_prompts.description: Hyper-realistic cyberpunk aesthetic with high contrast, sharp textures, and dynamic lighting inspired by 80s futuristic noir.
asset_prompts.music: Aggressive synthwave track with heavy bass, fast-paced electronic beats, and glitchy digital soundscapes.
asset_prompts.sfx: Digital glitch sounds, neon hum, electrical sparks, data processing blips, and high-impact cinematic booms.
